title: No file declaration found for module - Angular 15
author: NelsonGmzC
body:
Hello, is this library compatible with Angular v15?
I have a problem and it is that when I install the package I get the following message.
No file declaration found for module 'exceljs/dist/exceljs'. 'c:/03-OTHER 2023/MEAN/project-trivia/node_modules/exceljs/dist/exceljs.js' has an implicit type of "any".

In my project I do have the files in that path but I don't know why I don't recognize them.

![01](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/97978923/220243198-5de08637-6e05-4061-84d2-e34d4470fe7c.png)
![02](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/97978923/220243201-09425e66-715a-4ee3-9298-c7e43fc46ee9.png)

comments.author: anikets43
comments.body:
@NelsonGmzC Below configuration worked for me :)


```
{
  "compileOnSave": false,
  "compilerOptions": {
    "baseUrl": "./",
    "outDir": "./dist/out-tsc",
    "sourceMap": true,
    "declaration": false,
    "downlevelIteration": true,
    "experimentalDecorators": true,
    "module": "ES2022", // Update this
    "moduleResolution": "node",
    "importHelpers": true,
    "target": "ES2022", // Update this
    "typeRoots": ["node_modules/@types"],
    "lib": ["ES2022", "dom"], // Update this
    "types": ["node"] // Update this
  },

  "angularCompilerOptions": {
    "strictTemplates": true,
    "strictInjectionParameters": true
  }
}
```

comments.author: alvarocor
comments.body: Hi! Did you resolve this issue? I have a similar error and I can't resolve it.
